title: Worsening chronic asthma in primary care
shortDescription: Adult with chronic asthma becomes wheezier and more short of breath despite salbutamol and low-dose budesonide; PEFR is 80% of personal best.

title: Severe asthma exacerbation after repeated bronchodilator therapy
shortDescription: Adolescent with severe asthma develops hypokalemia and U waves after multiple nebulizer treatments during an acute exacerbation.

title: Theophylline overdose in a patient with asthma
shortDescription: Young adult with asthma presents after intentional theophylline overdose with seizures, hypotension, tachycardia, and respiratory distress.
